coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 5-group, 173-node closure.
validation: All eight Blender/VM cases have exact topology and four-decimal bounds, including authored 8,718 / 5,270 and holder-only 7,374 / 4,556. Blender-compatible Dual Mesh boundary handling and Exact planar surface booleans reproduce the rounded lattice, 21 circular openings, wall thickness, staggered bit instances, and visibility switch. Offset Scale is a no-op in all supplied Blender cases and is intentionally not exposed.
